notes: Shows six Recent Agent items in Dynamic and adds More when the complete history is longer.
Opens the Recent Agents manager directly and lets resumable rows reopen their source conversation.
Supports exact Codex, Claude Code, Gemini, Kiro, and Cursor background-agent destinations with a safe allow-listed launcher.
Adds Kiro as a default Agent for MCP, Skill, and Stop-hook configuration.
Keeps local Cursor sessions useful by reopening their recorded workspace when an exact conversation link is unavailable.
